title: AXPlatform
description: Service class for detecting and managing platform-specific information including browser, device, and technology detection.

types.title: AXPlatform

props.name: platform
props.description: Current platform type (Android, Desktop, iOS, Mobile).

props.name: browser
props.description: Current browser type (Chrome, Safari, Edge, Firefox, Opera, MSIE).

props.name: screenSize
props.description: Current screen size category (SM, MD, LG, XL, 2XL, 3XL, 4XL, 5XL).

props.name: themeMode
props.description: Current theme mode (light, dark, system, system-dark, system-light).

props.name: isMobile
props.description: Whether the current platform is mobile.

props.name: isDesktop
props.description: Whether the current platform is desktop.

props.name: isTablet
props.description: Whether the current platform is tablet.

types.description: Comprehensive platform detection and management service that provides information about the current environment.

methods.name: detect
methods.description: Detects the current platform and updates all platform properties.

methods.name: isPlatform
methods.description: Checks if the current platform matches the specified platform type.

methods.name: isBrowser
methods.description: Checks if the current browser matches the specified browser type.

methods.name: isTechnology
methods.description: Checks if the current technology matches the specified technology type.

methods.name: getScreenSize
methods.description: Returns the current screen size category based on viewport dimensions.

methods.name: setThemeMode
methods.description: Sets the current theme mode and applies it to the document.

methods.name: onResize
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when the screen size changes.

methods.name: onThemeChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when the theme mode changes.

methods.name: onOrientationChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when device orientation changes.

methods.name: onPlatformChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when platform detection changes.

methods.name: onBrowserChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when browser detection changes.

methods.name: onOnlineStatusChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when online/offline status changes.
